summary: Re-review of coder v2 (F1-F4 + decline F5) and v3 (architect decompose handoff A/B/D). All v1 findings closed; compare path genuinely single; ToRaw decompose now strictly leaf-confined (the v3 A refactor removed the AsCanonical bind-path deep-decompose I under-weighted in v1). Both suites green. One open design decision escalated to Ingi (non-blocking, tracked).

findings_resolved.detail: Compare.Order text arm now OrdinalIgnoreCase (Compare.cs:62), matches AreEqualValues; trichotomy restored; regression test added.
contains/in route through Compare.AreEqualValues (public); native list.@this handled; private Operator.AreEqual deleted; regression test added.

list.@this.FromRaw is the single native build-at-edge path; legacy List<object?>/Comparer<object>.Default/Distinct() arms deleted across sort/unique/reverse/set/remove/flatten; in-place mutators promote-and-write-back; range/split emit native. Bonus: Remove/contains/indexof moved onto Compare.AreEqualValues.

Keying Wire.IsDataShaped on type/signature would fail to lift plain [1,2,3] elements (writer emits type only when non-null, signature only when signed). name+value is correct for this writer-controlled wire. Decline accepted.

decompose_audit.detail: Architect decompose handoff A/B/D resolved in v3. A: AsCanonical bind path no longer deep-decomposes the dict (WireSlot/HasWireKey navigate via Get/Has; AsRawWireDict deleted) — corrects a v1 mis-classification. B: dict.ToRaw nested-list asymmetry bug fixed. D: CommandLineParser object/array symmetric. Every remaining ToRaw site is a typed-conversion leaf, external-lib leaf, or CLI perimeter; whole diff adds 2 raw allocations, both inside ToRaw.

open_for_ingi.title: wire-shape discriminator keys on value+type presence
open_for_ingi.detail: A user dict {value:9.99, type:'book'} is mis-detected as serialized Data on the bind path (IsWireShape, data/this.cs:737). Shared root of F5 and architect A.45. Language-semantics decision (reserve marker / key on signature / data type-stamp). Tracked: Documentation/Runtime2/todos.md 'Fully type-driven nested Data'. Not a blocker for PASS.
